caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, is visible in a small webcam overlay in the bottom left corner of a screen showing the "ITEM MANAGER" menu of a video game. The interface displays various digital player cards with numeric values beneath them, under categories such as "MY ITEMS," "SETS," and "AUCTION HOUSE." On-screen text at the top includes "179,037," "14,600," and "2,343,543." To the left, a filter menu lists options like "TYPE," "QUALITY," "TEAM," "PROGRAM," and "CHEMISTRY." As the sequence progresses, the man speaks while looking at the screen. In the final stages, a search bar appears over the card gallery with the placeholder text "ITEM NAME," while a purple rectangular highlight overlays a portion of the cards. The overall color scheme of the menu is dark purple and black with bright yellow accents.
